title: Ancestral architecture
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Ancestral architecture''' were the type of buildings made by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to evoke memories of [[Yuuzhan'tar|their homeworld]]. The buildings were rich in plants and wildlife. The [[Place of Sacrifice]] was built in the style.

{{Struct-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
